title: Maccah #4532
definition:
Massah = "temptation"

 1) the place in the wilderness where the Israelites tested Jehovah
    1a) also 'Meribah'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Massah = "temptation"

 1) the place in the wilderness where the Israelites tested Jehovah
    1a) also 'Meribah'

    NASB:  a place in the desert where Isr. rebelled
